payload.answer: Do not store the proposed transcript-as-memory. Only concise, durable facts or preferences extracted from the transcript should be considered separately.
citations: For context, LLM proposal: one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript.
payload.reason: An entire 8000-word transcript packaged as a single conversation_summary is not an appropriate durable memory. It is overly broad, likely contains transient/contextual details, and has not been distilled into specific stable facts or preferences.
